reasoning: Internal staff notes explicitly recommend approval as a VIP exception due to company's delayed response causing policy violation (90 days past purchase vs 30-day policy). Customer has high lifetime value ($6,200 across 42 orders) with only 2 prior refunds. The 'Shipped' status is contradicted by the documented internal acknowledgment of delivery failure in the comments history, which states 'Package was never delivered' per customer claim. Company's own notes confirm responsibility for the delay and recommend approval to retain VIP relationship.
